GameConditionDef.label: Illusive man rage
GameConditionDef.description: The Illusive man went into a state of uncontrollable rage. You seem to really annoy him.
GameConditionDef.endMessage: Illusive man came out of rage.
GameConditionDef.letterText: The Illusive man went into a state of uncontrollable rage. You seem to really annoy him.
